data.description:
## Why
The review-bot-ops runbook tells operators to run things 'On the box (SSM Session Manager)' but never states the instance id or region needed to actually start that session. The region IS single-sourced in terraform (var.aws_region default = us-east-1, backend pinned in versions.tf) and the instance id appears in ADR-0026, but neither is in the operational runbook where someone doing an SSM deploy looks — so they end up guessing the region. Surfaced during the f600 deploy.

## What
Add a 'The box (where prod runs)' reference section near the top of infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md: instance i-00880b2c7f13527c5, region us-east-1 (citing var.aws_region / versions.tf as the source of truth), account 896586841071, the 'aws ssm start-session'/'send-command' connect snippets, and a one-line note that autodeploy.sh is excluded from self-update (must be hand-deployed).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] infra/runbooks/review-bot-ops.md names the prod instance id AND region up front, with region traced to its terraform source of truth.
- [ ] Includes the SSM connect command(s).
- [ ] Docs-only change; no behavior change.

## Out of scope
- Changing where the region is defined (stays var.aws_region in terraform).
data.title: docs(runbook): state prod box instance id + region in review-bot-ops (SSM ops shouldn't guess)
